artifacts.name: exportService
artifacts.description: exportModelJSON (versioned JSON download via Blob+anchor, cross-browser) + importModelJSON (schema validation + XSS sanitization via closed allowlists). Version 1.0.0 format with exportedAt ISO timestamp. NFR-SEC-002 satisfied.

artifacts.name: ActionBar
artifacts.description: Save/Load/Export/Import buttons with data-testid=btn-export and data-testid=btn-import. FileReader-based import with error isolation (CLR-05). Auto-dismiss notifications via notify() helper. NFR-A11Y-001 satisfied.

artifacts.name: Notification
artifacts.description: Auto-dismissing success/error notification overlay with role=status aria-live=polite (NFR-A11Y-001). Robust error detection via .toLowerCase().includes('error').

artifacts.name: exportService-tests
artifacts.description: Unit tests: T-FE-SHARE-001-01 (versioned JSON blob content), T-FE-SHARE-001-02 (import valid), T-FE-SHARE-001-03 (import error throws), download trigger test. Uses vi globals (globals:true in vite.config.ts).

artifacts.name: ActionBar-tests
artifacts.description: Component tests: T-FE-SHARE-001-04 (export button calls exportModelJSON), import success (store populated), import error (scene preserved + notification shown). Mocked FileReader for synchronous jsdom testing.

artifacts.name: e2e-tests
artifacts.description: Playwright E2E: T-E2E-AFOL-001-01 (AFOL build+export flow), T-E2E-ERR-001-01 (invalid import shows error), T-SEC-SEC-001-01 (no external requests during export/import).

artifacts.name: e2e-fixture-valid
artifacts.description: Valid 2-brick model fixture for E2E import tests.

artifacts.name: e2e-fixture-invalid
artifacts.description: Malformed JSON fixture for E2E error-path tests.

artifacts.name: implementation-PR
artifacts.description: [area:frontend] Implement FR-SHARE-001 JSON Export & Import (#17) — open, reviewed APPROVED WITH MINOR NOTES by frontend-review-agent

summary.work_completed: Verified FR-SHARE-001 (JSON Export & Import) implementation is complete on feature/17-json-export-import (PR #55). All 7 test IDs from issue #17 are satisfied. Implementation reviewed by frontend-review-agent with APPROVED WITH MINOR NOTES verdict. vitest globals:true confirmed in vite.config.ts (addresses review observation #2 about vi usage without import). Production code and all test files are present and correct on the branch.
key_findings: exportService.ts: exportModelJSON uses Blob+anchor download (cross-browser, no server round-trip), importModelJSON validates version+bricks fields and sanitizes all fields against closed allowlists (XSS prevention per NFR-SEC-002)

ActionBar.tsx: btn-export triggers exportModelJSON with current bricks, btn-import triggers hidden file input + FileReader, errors caught and shown as notification without corrupting scene (CLR-05), file input reset after import

Notification.tsx: role=status aria-live=polite for screen reader support (NFR-A11Y-001), robust error detection via .toLowerCase().includes('error'), stateless component (auto-dismiss managed by ActionBar.notify())
vitest globals:true confirmed in vite.config.ts — vi.fn()/vi.spyOn() available globally in all test files without explicit import
All 7 test IDs satisfied: T-FE-SHARE-001-01 through 04 (unit/component), T-E2E-AFOL-001-01, T-E2E-ERR-001-01, T-SEC-SEC-001-01 (E2E/security)

recommended_actions: Note: frontend-review-agent has already reviewed PR #55 with APPROVED WITH MINOR NOTES (see review comment on PR)
Verify exportService.ts: exportModelJSON uses Blob+anchor, importModelJSON validates version+bricks fields and sanitizes all fields
Verify XSS sanitization: type/colorId/rotation allowlists, id truncated to 64 chars (NFR-SEC-002)
Verify ActionBar.tsx: btn-export triggers exportModelJSON, btn-import triggers FileReader, errors show notification without corrupting scene (CLR-05)
Verify Notification.tsx: role=status aria-live=polite, robust error detection via .includes('error')
Confirm vitest globals:true in vite.config.ts (vi available globally — no import needed in test files)
